welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.desc: Hi, I’m Fish. I live in Taichung, Taiwan, and I’ve been working remotely for 12 years now. It’s great to have you here!

about.title: About ...
about.desc:
Hello, I’m Fish, a Frontend Developer with 16 years of experience, based in Taichung, Taiwan—and I’ve been working remotely for the last 12 of them. I’m passionate about translating stunning designs into 1:1 pixel-perfect reality. With over 300 projects under my belt, I’ve mastered the art of building modular components that are not just reusable, but highly scalable down the line.

In the future, I hope to contribute my expertise to large-scale projects and help bring complex, high-impact web applications to life.

skills.title: Core Skills ...
skills.desc: HTML / CSS / SCSS / RWD / 1:1 Pixel-Perfect / Tailwind CSS / JavaScript / TypeScript / jQuery / GSAP / Vue / React / Figma / Photoshop / Illustrator / Wireframe / UI Design / SEO / Cross-Browser Compatibility / Performance Optimization

works.title: Selected Works
works.project2Content:
Website：www.taiwanbm.com.tw

Large-Scale System Implementation:
Independently architected and developed 150+ unique pages for a complex B2B e-commerce platform, including sophisticated interfaces for user, member, and merchant management.

Modular Architecture:
Established a custom SCSS component library within an SSR environment. Applied component-based thinking to maintain strict visual consistency and maximize development efficiency across a massive volume of pages.

Complex UI Challenge (Multi-Level Navigation):
Successfully engineered a 5-tier vertical category menu. Collaborated deeply with PMs and engineers to balance intuitive user flow with high-performance information hierarchy.

Performance & SEO Optimization:
Managed lightweight JavaScript/jQuery integrations and rich-text editor functionality. Optimized the site’s semantic structure to enhance SEO performance and organic search visibility.

Pixel-Perfect RWD Calibration:
Executed meticulous, pixel-level adjustments for 150+ pages to ensure a seamless and high-precision browsing experience across all device screen sizes.
works.project3Content:
Website：www.lcsdevco.com.tw

GSAP-Driven Visual Storytelling:
Transformed rigid industrial product showcases into a fluid, high-end digital experience. Implemented a vertical scroll-triggered animation for the homepage using GSAP, creating a layered, cinematic entrance that significantly increased user engagement and dwell time.

Seamless Navigation & UX Interaction:
Developed an intuitive anchor-point navigation system for product catalogs. This allows clients to jump to specific products with elegant transition effects, adding a layer of sophistication to the rigorous industrial catalog while maintaining ease of use.

Balancing Performance with High-Fidelity Visuals:
Optimized GSAP rendering paths to ensure smooth, stutter-free performance even when handling high-resolution industrial imagery. Successfully maintained cross-browser compatibility and rapid loading speeds despite the rich interactive elements.

Precision RWD Layouts:
Precisely controlled the presentation of industrial product images and RWD layouts, ensuring that technical specifications remain highly readable and visually impactful across all devices.

archive.title: Project Archive ...
archive.desc: A living archive of over 300+ projects spanning 16 years. This legacy portfolio preserves my original work and coding styles from over a decade ago, documenting my continuous journey in web development.
